title: Child Care Providers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Child Care & Parenting > Child Care Providers 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO CHILD CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Child Care Referral Specialists offer specialized information about child care and referrals to child care providers and preschools. Specialists can also provide detailed information on Employment-Related Day Care (ERDC). Eligibility: Parents and caregivers of children up to age 18 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-11pm, Saturday-Sunday 8am-8pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details FIND CHILD CARE OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps families locate child care through referrals and provides resources to help make informed decisions about child care needs. 211info is available to provide families referrals to support their child care search, or families can conduct their own search on the website. Website Eligibility: Parents/caregivers of children up to age 18 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-11pm, Saturday-Sunday 8am-8pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details YMCA OF TILLAMOOK COUNTY SUMMER DAY CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an action-packed summer playing outdoors, creating arts and crafts, participating in free swim, enjoying healthy snacks, visiting Camp Makuala, and exploring weekly themes, among other activities. With numerous daily activities, your child is sure to have an action-packed and memorable summer. 610 Stillwell Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Kindergarten through age 10 Hours: Monday - Friday 7:30am-6pm Email (503) 842-9622 107 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YMCA OF TILLAMOOK COUNTY SUMMER DAY CAMPS
